title: World Cup to Drive Billions in Betting Volume
title_cn: 世界杯将带动数十亿的投注额
summary:
This year’s World Cup is the first since prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket exploded to popularity as a new way to bet on sports.
Chad Beynon, Senior Gaming, Lodging, and Theaters Analyst at Macquarie, talks about how the World Cup is impacting the US sports betting market and which stocks stand to benefit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Giants Power Stock Gains After AI-Fueled Rout: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能推动股市大跌后，科技巨头推动股市上涨：市场结束
summary: A rally in several technology giants lifted stocks after last week’s artificial-intelligence selloff lured buyers betting the industry’s investment boom will continue to support solid corporate earnings.

title: Comcast Rises on Split; Iridium Up on Rocket Lab Deal | Stock Movers
title_cn: 康卡斯特在斯普利特崛起；铱星公司与火箭实验室达成交易库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Comcast (CMCSA) is rising after it announced its intention to separate into two independent publicly traded companies through a tax-free spin-off of NBCUniversal and Sky. Upon completion of the transaction, Comcast shareholders will own shares in both Comcast and NBCUniversal.

- Iridium (IRDM) is moving on news Rocket Lab will acquire the company in a deal that focuses on vertically integrating space and satellite capabilities.

- SpaceX (SPCX) is up in the premarket as it will become a component of the Nasdaq-100 Index prior to market open on July 7, 2026, Nasdaq announces. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Thwarts Trump Bid to Oust Fed’s Cook for Now
title_cn: 最高法院暂时阻止特朗普罢免美联储厨师的提议
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook can stay in her job for now, reinforcing the central bank’s independence from the White House and dealing a setback to President Donald Trump.

title: Supreme Court Rules Lisa Cook Can Remain at Fed for Now
title_cn: 最高法院裁定丽莎库克暂时可以留在美联储
summary: The US Supreme Court refused to let President Donald Trump immediately fire Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook. In a 5-4 vote, the high court said Cook can stay in her job while she fights Trump’s bid to oust her over unproven mortgage fraud allegations. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. unveiled a sweeping overhaul of the financing model underpinning its Bitcoin strategy, giving itself broader powers to sell the cryptocurrency, buy back securities and preserve liquidity as it adapts to mounting pressure on the structure that fueled years of aggressive accumulation.

title: Bomb Attack Damages Ecuador Mining Agency Probing Illegal Gold
title_cn: 厄瓜多尔矿业机构遭炸弹袭击损坏，正在调查非法黄金
summary: A bomb apparently targeting Ecuador’s mining regulator blew out several floors of windows at a major government building in the capital of Quito early Monday morning.

title: Iraq’s 14 Million Barrels of Trapped Oil Escape Through Hormuz

summary: Iraqi oil stranded by the Middle East conflict has escaped the Persian Gulf over the past 10 days as transit via the Strait of Hormuz eased during an uneasy US-Iran ceasefire.

title_cn: 日元跌至四个十年新低，历史性下滑令日本不安
summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market.

summary: In the market for junior bank capital — where distinctions between strong and weak banks matter most — investors are becoming remarkably indifferent.

summary: Bargain hunters emerged to pick up beaten-down technology stocks on Monday, helping US stocks rally from last week’s declines.

title: The Fed Will Stay Patient, Says Michael Darda
title_cn: 迈克尔·达尔达表示美联储将保持耐心
summary: Michael Darda, Roth Capital chief economist and macro strategist, joins to talk about Federal Reserve monetary policy and says the agency will remain "patient." He also talks about a potential ruling from the Supreme Court about Lisa Cook. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kenya, Congo Eurobonds Among Top Winners From Iran War Trade Unwind

summary: Kenya and Democratic Republic of Congo are among the top performing African debt markets this month, as tumbling crude prices lure investors back to securities issued by oil importers.

title: Europe’s Boldest Tech Startups Are Reaching for US SPACs Again
title_cn: 欧洲最大胆的科技初创公司再次进军美国SPAC
summary: Newcleo Ltd., a European startup building novel nuclear reactors that run on recycled waste, has the potential to disrupt clean energy. As with all new technology, the path is not easy.

title: Poor Pod Counts Signal Sharp Drop in Ivory Coast Cocoa Crop
title_cn: 豆荚计数不佳预示着科特迪瓦可可产量急剧下降
summary: The cocoa crop in top grower Ivory Coast could fall by about a fifth in the next season as the number of pods on trees lags, risking tighter global supplies, according to traders surveyed by Bloomberg.

summary: The smallest, riskiest group of US stocks has put in a magnificent performance in the first half of the year. You never would have guessed it by looking at investor positioning.

title: Oil Trades Near Four-Month Low as US and Iran Halt Fresh Attacks

summary: Oil held above the lowest since the end of February after the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following flare-ups over the weekend that saw a supertanker hit near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Paris Corn Prices Climb Above Wheat After Searing Heat Wave
title_cn: 炎热热浪过后，巴黎玉米价格攀升至小麦之上
summary: Paris corn futures extended their advance for a fourth session as a heat wave moved east across Europe, stoking concerns over the region’s crop outlook.

summary: Italian energy giant Eni SpA and the investment unit of the Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. agreed to buy stakes in a liquefied natural gas production and export project in Argentina.

title: Markets to Consolidate in Summer of Volatility, BNY’s Levine Says
title_cn: 纽约银行的莱文表示，市场将在夏季波动中整合
summary: Alicia Levine, chief investment officer at BNY Wealth, expects an upswing in volatility over the next few months, but sees a broadening of earnings driving the S&P 500 to 8,000 by the end of the year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s Rapid Delivery Push Triggers $15 Billion Rout for Eternal, Swiggy
title_cn: 亚马逊的快速配送推动 Eternal 和 Swiggy 损失 150 亿美元
summary: Eternal Ltd. and Swiggy Ltd. got the 10-minute delivery party going in India. Now, e-commerce titans Amazon.com Inc. and Walmart Inc.’s Flipkart are looking to crash it.

title: Baidu’s CFO on the Company’s Approach to Recruiting Young Talent
title_cn: 百度首席财务官谈公司招募年轻人才的方法
summary:
In the China tech space, Baidu is now a full-stack player in the AI industry. As the maker of its own chips, AI model (Ernie), cloud system and a self-driving car business (Apollo Go), the tech giant is a very desirable company to work for.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Baidu CFO Henry He joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how the company uses AI to evolve its own organizational structure and attract new talent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast to Spin Off NBCUniversal and Sky, Sending Shares Soaring
title_cn: 康卡斯特将分拆 NBCUniversal 和 Sky，股价飙升
summary: Comcast Corp. plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding acquisitions it made more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders.

title: Comcast Shares Surge on Plan to Spin Off NBCUniversal
title_cn: 康卡斯特股价因计划分拆 NBCUniversal 而飙升
summary: Comcast said it plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky into a new publicly traded company as it looks to separate its media businesses from its cable-TV and internet operations. Kelcee Griffis reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Relx Plans to Buy Back Up to £100 Million in Shares Next Month
title_cn: Relx 计划下个月回购高达 1 亿英镑的股票
summary: Relx Plc plans to repurchase shares valued at as much as £100 million ($132.1 million) next month, as the British information and analytics company continues to grapple with concerns that artificial intelligence tools will displace its core research products.

title: Millennium Builds AI Lab in Push for Cutting-Edge Products
title_cn: Millennium 建立人工智能实验室，推动尖端产品
summary: Millennium Management is setting up an artificial intelligence laboratory to expand the development and application of cutting-edge technologies at the firm.

title: The Uninvited Meeting Guest Is an AI Notetaker
title_cn: 不速之客是一位人工智能记笔记者
summary: AI bots are showing up to remote meetings faster than humans can create social norms to guide them.

title: Verizon, BT Merge International Units in Pivot to Home Markets
title_cn: Verizon 与 BT 合并国际业务，转向国内市场
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. and the UK’s BT Group Plc agreed to create a joint venture for their international businesses in a merger that will take the low-margin units off their books and allow the carriers to focus on their home markets.

title: Ferrari Luce, New Golf Cart Reflect Apple Design Aesthetic
title_cn: Ferrari Luce，新款高尔夫球车体现 Apple 设计美学
summary: Ive, Hoenig reflect their Apple experience in new vehicles

title: Samsung, SK to Spend $880 Billion to Drive Korea’s AI Lead
title_cn: 三星、SK 将斥资 8800 亿美元推动韩国人工智能领先地位
summary: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least 1,350 trillion won ($880 billion) from companies including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. into chips and data centers, a giant outlay in digital infrastructure it called essential to surviving the AI era.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix at Center of South Korea's AI Drive
title_cn: 三星、SK 海力士是韩国人工智能驱动的中心
summary: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least $880 billion from companies including Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix into infrastructure it called essential to surviving the AI era. Bloomberg's Sangmi Cha reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Verizon Sees Quarterly Loss of Up to $800 Million Due to BT Deal
title_cn: 由于 BT 交易，Verizon 预计季度亏损高达 8 亿美元
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. projected a second-quarter loss of between $700 million and $800 million after striking a deal with UK’s BT Group Plc to create a joint venture for their international businesses.

title: China Pushes All School Levels to Teach AI in Xi’s Tech Drive
title_cn: 在习近平的科技驱动下，中国推动各级学校教授人工智能
summary: China has announced a formal plan to integrate artificial intelligence across all levels of schooling, aligning its education system with President Xi Jinping’s campaign to dominate advanced technologies.

title: Germany Wants and Needs AI to Take Human Jobs
title_cn: 德国希望并需要人工智能来取代人类的工作
summary: The country’s workforce is aging and retiring.

title: Chinese Spies, Smuggled Drugs Fuel Takaichi’s Security Push
title_cn: 中国间谍、走私毒品推动高市的安全行动
summary: Chinese spies stealing Japanese industrial secrets in boardrooms. Chip smugglers ferrying Nvidia’s prized artificial intelligence semiconductors via Japan. Drug gangs quietly slipping fentanyl across Japan’s borders to a US opioid crisis.

title: Google Cloud to Offer Specialist AI Models for Science Research
title_cn: 谷歌云将为科学研究提供专业人工智能模型
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google will start offering specialist artificial intelligence models from software company SandboxAQ through its cloud service, expanding enterprise and research access to technology designed to accelerate drug discovery, materials science and semiconductor manufacturing.

title: China Births Two Robot Unicorns as Sector Funding Stays Strong
title_cn: 行业资金强劲，中国诞生两家机器人独角兽
summary: Two Chinese robotics startups have been valued at more than $2.9 billion in recent funding rounds, demonstrating steady interest in the sector and boosting the country’s efforts to compete with US firms like Tesla Inc. and Figure AI Inc.

title: AirTrunk Is Said to Be Near Confidential Filing for Biggest Singapore IPO in Years
title_cn: 据称，AirTrunk 即将提交新加坡多年来最大规模的 IPO 申请
summary: Blackstone Inc.-backed data center operator AirTrunk is close to filing confidentially for an initial public offering of a real estate investment trust in Singapore, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Prosus Profit Jumps as Bets on E-Commerce Businesses Pay Off
title_cn: Prosus 利润猛增，押注电子商务业务获得回报
summary: Prosus NV said profit more than doubled in the last fiscal year, beating analysts’ estimates as growth in the tech investment company’s e-commerce businesses and an increase in the value of the stake it owns in China’s Tencent Holdings Ltd. boosted earnings.

title: South Korea's Massive AI Investment Push
title_cn: 韩国大力推动人工智能投资
summary: South Korea is launching a 1,350 trillion won ($880 billion) plan in corporate investments to build out critical AI infrastructure and cement its global dominance in the semiconductor market. President Lee Jae Myung called the sweeping mega-project a "national survival strategy" for the AI era. Bloomberg’s Avril Hong breaks down the press conference, where President Lee was joined by the CEOs of tech giants Samsung and SK Hynix to outline the multi-year roadmap. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player | Odd Lots
title_cn: 百度CFO谈其如何成为全栈AI玩家 |零股
summary: In the China tech space, Baidu is now a full-stack player in the AI industry. The company makes its own chips, has its own AI models (Ernie), its own cloud system, and it's integrating AI into its self-driving car business, Apollo Go. But before all this, Baidu was known for being China's leader in search. Things, obviously, have changed a lot since the company was founded in the late 1990s. In today's episode, we speak with Baidu CFO Henry He about the company's AI ambitions. He talks to us about maximizing token spend, how Chinese tech firms are thinking about safety and alignment, the global robotaxi competition, and how the core search business fits into the company now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sintra Has Catalyst Potential This Week: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 辛特拉本周具有催化剂潜力：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Rebound as Samsung, SK Hynix Unveil Spending Plan
title_cn: 三星、SK 海力士公布支出计划，韩国股市反弹
summary: South Korean stocks recouped earlier losses as Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. pledged massive investment during a government briefing that underscored the country’s commitment to AI development.

title: China Blacklists More Japan Entities Amid Feud | The China Show 6/29/2026
title_cn: 中国因不和将更多日本实体列入黑名单中国展 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prosus Focused on Growing Just Eat Globally, CEO Bloisi Says
title_cn: 首席执行官布洛伊西表示，Prosus 专注于在全球范围内发展 Just Eat
summary: Prosus CEO Fabricio Bloisi says its food takeaway firm Just Eat will start delivering growth in the next few months and has plans for global growth. Bloisi speaks on Bloomberg Television after Prosus announced that profit more than doubled last fiscal year, beating analysts’ estimates helped by growth in the tech investment company’s e-commerce businesses. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's Robots Try World Cup-Style Penalty Kicks
title_cn: 中国机器人尝试世界杯式点球
summary: Chinese humanoid robots are stealing the spotlight at Mobile World Congress in Shanghai — but can they keep up with the World Cup spirit? From penalty kicks to piano playing, Bloomberg's Stephen Engle puts them to the test. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korea Unveils Plan to Sustain Lead in AI
title_cn: 韩国公布维持人工智能领先地位的计划
summary: South Korea unveiled an ambitious plan aimed at cementing its status as a technological powerhouse, with companies led by Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. initiating large-scale investments in memory chips, data centers and robotics. Samsung and SK Hynix leaders sat next to President Lee Jae Myung at a briefing, and are expected to give more details of their future investment plans. Bloomberg's Cat Barton reports from Seoul. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic's Mythos 5 Cleared by US for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 已获美国批准以供更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic PBC won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 artificial intelligence model, after resolving concerns from Donald Trump's administration about the technology’s potential threats to national security. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung, SK Hynix to Build Two Chip Fabs in $518 Billion Project
title_cn: 三星和 SK 海力士将在 5180 亿美元项目中建设两座芯片工厂
summary: The Samsung Electronics Co. semiconductor plant in Pyeongtaek, South Korea. Photographer: SeongJoon Cho/Bloomberg

title: Supreme Court Expands President’s Power to Fire Officials
title_cn: 最高法院扩大总统解雇官员的权力
summary: A divided US Supreme Court expanded the president’s power to fire top government officials in a blockbuster decision that puts the White House firmly in control of potentially dozens of agencies that have long operated independently.

title: Supreme Court Expands Trump's Power to Fire Top Officials
title_cn: 最高法院扩大特朗普解雇高级官员的权力
summary: A divided US Supreme Court expanded the president’s power to fire top government officials. The ruling lets President Donald Trump fire Democratic Federal Trade Commission member Rebecca Kelly Slaughter despite a law that says commissioners can be removed only for specified reasons. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Says Mail Ballots Can Arrive After Election Day
title_cn: 最高法院称邮寄选票可以在选举日后送达
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that federal law permits mail-in ballots to arrive after Election Day in a decision that preserves grace periods in 30 states. Tyler Kendall reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Says Mail Votes Can Arrive After Election Day
title_cn: 最高法院称邮寄选票可以在选举日后送达
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that federal law permits mail-in ballots to arrive after Election Day in a decision that preserves grace periods in 30 states.

title: US and Iran Set for Talks in Doha After Halting Attacks
title_cn: 美国和伊朗停止袭击后将在多哈举行会谈
summary: US President Donald Trump said peace talks with Iran are set to resume on Tuesday in Doha, after both sides agreed to halt a series of tit-for-tat attacks over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Nasdaq, NYSE to Ring Bell From Oval Office, Tout Trump Accounts
title_cn: 纳斯达克、纽约证券交易所将在椭圆形办公室敲响警钟，兜售特朗普账户
summary: Officials from the Nasdaq and the New York Stock Exchange plan to ring the opening bell from the Oval Office to mark the launch of Trump Accounts for minors, top White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett announced.

title: Poland Signs $4.8 Billion Defense Deal, Deepening Sweden Ties
title_cn: 波兰签署 48 亿美元国防协议，深化瑞典关系
summary: Poland has signed a final deal with Saab AB to purchase three submarines for around 47 billion kronor ($4.83 billion) as Warsaw seeks to bolster its maritime defense capabilities and forge closer ties with NATO ally Sweden.

title: Milei Taps Lifetime Politician to Lead His Cabinet After Scandal
title_cn: 丑闻发生后，米雷任命终身政治家领导内阁
summary: Argentine President Javier Milei tapped a seasoned politician he once openly insulted on the campaign trail to become the fourth cabinet chief of his government plagued by corruption scandals.

title: Australia, Vanuatu Agree Deal After Impasse Over China Ties
title_cn: 澳大利亚与瓦努阿图在中国关系陷入僵局后达成协议
summary: Australia and the Pacific island nation of Vanuatu have sealed a cooperation deal, with the final agreement reported to be substantially revised from a preliminary accord signed last year.

title: Burnham Vows to Grow Economy by Taking Powers Out of London
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言通过剥夺伦敦权力来发展经济
summary: Andy Burnham pledged to radically devolve fiscal powers away from Westminster if he succeeds in his bid to replace Keir Starmer as prime minister.

title: Spain to Phase Out Electricity Generation Tax, Government Says
title_cn: 西班牙政府表示将逐步取消发电税
summary: The Spanish government will scrap one of its main electricity taxes.

title: What’s Left of the Education Department After Trump Dismantling
title_cn: 特朗普解散后教育部还剩下什么
summary: Trump promised to shut down the agency. After 18 months of sweeping cuts and bureaucratic maneuvering, only a husk of it remains.

title: Strait of Hormuz Flare-Ups Amplify US-Iran Risks
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡突发事件加剧美伊风险
summary: Starting a war is a lot easier than ending one, it seems

title: UK's Burnham Vows Decentralized Power in Bid to Boost Economy
title_cn: 英国伯纳姆誓言权力下放以提振经济
summary: Andy Burnham, who is likely to be the UK's next prime minister following Keir Starmer's decision to resign, outlines plans to decentralize power in a bid to boost the economy and raise living standards. "I am going to give Britain the circuit breaker it needs by building a more collaborative politics," Burnham says during a speech in Manchester. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: An Unlikely Mix of Earthquake Support Rallies for Venezuela
title_cn: 一场不太可能发生的地震支持委内瑞拉集会
summary: Trump-aligned governments to stalwarts of the Maduro era rush to help Caracas.

title: Chinese Military Teases First Look of Sixth-Gen Jet in Video
title_cn: 中国军方在视频中首次展示第六代喷气式飞机
summary: China’s military appeared to give its first glimpse of a new fighter aircraft widely believed to be a sixth-generation prototype that could eventually rival advanced stealth warplanes under development in the US.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix to Spend $880 Billion on Chips, Data Centers
title_cn: 三星和 SK 海力士将斥资 8800 亿美元开发芯片和数据中心
summary: South Korea is orchestrating investments of at least 1,350 trillion won ($880 billion) from companies including Samsung and SK Hynix into chips and data centers, a giant outlay in digital infrastructure it called essential to surviving the AI era. Bloomberg's Shona Ghosh has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EIB Pledges Record €3 Billion Airbus Loan for Tech Development
title_cn: EIB 承诺为技术开发提供创纪录的 30 亿欧元空中客车贷款
summary: The European Investment Bank will provide an unprecedented €3 billion ($3.4 billion) loan to Airbus SE as the European Union pushes ahead with plans to bolster its technological sovereignty amid intensifying competition from the US and China.

title: Japan Protests China’s Maritime Claims After Bomber Flights
title_cn: 日本在轰炸机飞行后抗议中国的海事主张
summary: Japan has protested activity by Chinese coast guard vessels asserting Beijing’s claims to maritime borders close to a southern Japanese island, Tokyo’s top government spokesman said, days after Tokyo scrambled fighter jets in response to flights by Chinese and Russian bombers around Japan’s south.

title: China Escalates Takaichi Feud by Blacklisting More Japan Firms
title_cn: 中国将更多日本公司列入黑名单，加剧了高市的不和
summary: China expanded its export-control offensive against Japan, doubling the number of Japanese entities subject to curbs and deepening a feud with Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s government.

title: Putin Ready for Ukraine Talks But Won’t Halt Long-Range Strikes
title_cn: 普京准备好进行乌克兰会谈但不会停止远程打击
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin said he’s ready to continue talks with US envoys on ending the war in Ukraine, while rejecting a proposal to halt long-range strikes that have proven damaging for both sides.

title: Putin Acknowledges Russia Faces Fuel Supply Problems
title_cn: 普京承认俄罗斯面临燃料供应问题
summary: President Vladimir Putin said Russia continues to face a fuel supply squeeze as the Kremlin weighs measures to stabilize the domestic market following refinery outages.

title: Burnham Pledges Sweeping Devolution in Bid for UK Leadership
title_cn: 伯纳姆承诺彻底下放权力以争夺英国领导地位
summary: Andy Burnham will pledge the biggest devolution of power in England in modern times in his first major speech since confirming his intention to succeed Keir Starmer as the UK’s prime minister.
